### Available Sizes

### Product Information

- Matte safe spray on silica-based sealant!

- Keeps matte surfaces matte

- Protects for up to 6 weeks

- Product Code: GY-1627

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Product Description

The Gyeon Cure Matte is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte finished paints! When working on matte surfaces, you want to make sure you are using products designed for matte. If you do not, you risk adding unwanted white streaks that are very hard to remove. With Cure Matte, Gyeon has designed a spray sealant that will protect your matte surfaces for up to 6 weeks. Just spray and wipe, application is incredibly easy and the protection left behind will not add any gloss to the surface. This sealant will keep the matte surfaces the way we love them, matte. Cure Matte will however increase the depth and intensity of the matte color and through regular maintenance, you can extend the hydrophobic effect of up to 90% of the durability of the base coating applied. This allows you to continue to protect the surface and combat ugly water marks from happening.

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Concentrated maintenance spray for any matte surface & ceramic coating. Easy and fast application. Enhances and protects.


**


- Matte ceramic maintenance

- Self-cleaning properties

- Water repellent
**


#### Directions

Shake well before use. Use only on a clean surface. Spray onto a microfiber and rub in a panel at a time till a streak free finish. Wet/dry use possible. Makes drying the car easier. ** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **
